page.title: Recipes
page.subtitle: Create and manage your own recipes

Do you want to delete the recipe "{{name}}"?

NOTE: This will delete the recipe both from here AND from the food list where it may be used for logging.

page.infoCombineText: Create recipes by adding multiple food items with specific amounts.
page.infoNutritionText: Nutrition values are calculated automatically based on ingredients.
page.infoServingsText: Enter the number of servings to get nutrition per serving.
page.infoAddText: Saved recipes automatically become searchable as food items and can be easily logged in your daily meals.

savedMeals.tip3: Perfect for breakfast that's often the same
savedMeals.tip4: Change amounts as needed when logging
savedMeals.recipeExplainText: For food you cook yourself. Combines ingredients into a new "food item".
savedMeals.savedMealExplainText: A combination of food items/recipes you often eat together.
